objective: Resolve mismatches before expensive runs

notes: Canonical final evidence uses frozen final_ema OOF artifacts from Drive; local model directory may still contain historical raw checkpoints.

objective: Remove overclaims before rebuttal

objective: Address ranking-decision gap and safety wording
required_output: ECE, MCE, Brier, reliability diagram, threshold metrics

objective: Provide fair ECG baselines under one protocol
required_output: Full, Raw Mamba, ResNet1D/CNN, MiniRocket-only, HRV-only table
notes: MiniRocket-only, HRV-only, ResNet1D/CNN, and Raw Mamba are complete under the frozen OOF contract. ResNet1D/CNN is stronger than ECG-RAMBA on all five paired in-domain metrics; Raw Mamba is stronger on PR-AUC, ROC-AUC, and F1 while ECG-RAMBA has lower Brier/ECE. Global fair-baseline superiority remains unsupported.

objective: Report reviewer-safe uncertainty
required_output: Bootstrap 95% CI and paired bootstrap deltas
notes: Record-level bootstrap/paired evidence exists for the current comparator package; use only supported metric-specific conclusions.

objective: Improve mathematical and implementation clarity

notes: Writing pack identifies method/appendix edits. Full manuscript appendix still needs author drafting.

objective: Answer noise missing-lead and sampling-rate concerns
required_output: SNR 20/10/5 dB, random 3-lead dropout, V1-V6 dropout, 500->250 Hz degradation
notes: Six robustness stresses complete. Use only metric-specific paired degradation/stressed-performance claims.

objective: Justify or revise Q=3 aggregation
required_output: Mean, Q=2, Q=3, Q=4, Q=8, max comparison
notes: Pooling sensitivity supports Q=3 as frozen tradeoff, not global optimum.

objective: Test whether HRV encodes dataset source

notes: PTB-XL, Georgia, and CPSC2021 few-shot score-calibration packages are complete after passed external gates. This is frozen-score calibration only; do not claim model fine-tuning or general few-shot superiority.

objective: Optional stronger baseline
required_output: Transformer ECG result or limitation statement

Run only if reviewer requires transformer-specific comparator; use significant wording only after the paired output is generated and its CI supports the metric-specific statement.

objective: Increase external validity if mapping is stable

notes: PTB-XL, Georgia, and CPSC2021 protocol gates passed with dataset-specific mapping/window restrictions. Use only protocol-gated mapped-task wording; no unqualified external-transfer claim.

notes: Deployment latency remains supplementary only.

notes: Runner 39, paired runner 40, per-fold Drive checkpoints/caches, and strict closure gate are implemented. Results remain unavailable until all ten fold contracts and 1000-bootstrap paired outputs pass.

notes: Source paired grid exists locally; Notebook 07 now authenticates the exact 45-row 1000-bootstrap group-safe grid and emits a compact table.

objective: Complete robustness under noise lead loss and resampling across fair learned comparators
required_output: Six stresses x MiniRocket/ResNet/Raw-Mamba/Transformer x five metrics with 1000 paired degradation bootstraps
notes: Canonical-resume mode stages one stress at a time, reuses the Drive metric cache, and fails closed unless all 120 rows are complete.

objective: Test the frozen Q=3 operating point consistently on every gated external task
required_output: PTB-XL/Georgia/CPSC2021 x mean/Q2/Q3/Q4/Q8/max plus group-paired Q3 deltas
notes: Notebook 06 now requires all three datasets, six methods, strict group bootstrap, and 1000 replicates; Q=3 remains a frozen tradeoff rather than a universal optimum.

objective: Separate discrimination from score-level calibration under matched folds
required_output: Raw and cross-fitted per-class Platt NLL/Brier/ECE/slope/intercept with paired record bootstrap and reliability figure
notes: Cross-fitted calibrators exclude evaluated-fold labels. Bootstrap conditions on fitted calibrators and base models; use as post-hoc score sensitivity, not nested deployment calibration or clinical safety evidence.

objective: Test internal contribution of explicit morphology rhythm and context/fusion interfaces
required_output: Fresh five-fold Full, removal of the fixed-transform morphology stream and its dependent cross-attention interaction, removal of the checkpoint-compatible five-RR-plus-six-global-statistics conditioning interface, joint context/fusion removal, Raw Mamba control, and paired bootstrap
notes: All variants share fold seeds, a fold-seeded Full-reference overlap initialization with module-group hashes, an independent fixed minibatch-order generator, training budget, checkpoint-compatible HRV semantics, and one training-fold-only PCA SHA per fold. Raw ECG remains available in the morphology- and rhythm-interface removals. The no-morphology control also removes its dependent cross-attention interaction, so claims remain endpoint-specific and concern the morphology/fusion interface as a unit.

objective: Present 0/1/5/10 percent target-group behavior for every learned model
required_output: Full ResNet Raw-Mamba Transformer learning curves with pre-specified 10 percent primary endpoint and group-bootstrap CIs
notes: Full improves relative to its own zero-target-label state but matched comparators remain stronger. Describe as frozen-encoder linear-head adaptation; no end-to-end or broad few-shot superiority claim.

objective: Test branch selectivity against measured HR PR QRS QT and QTc targets
required_output: Reviewed target provenance, fold-held-out Ridge probes, paired branch contrasts and bootstrap CIs
notes: Runs only when record-aligned measured metadata and reviewed provenance pass. Missing metadata is an explicit blocker that removes stale TeX output; no proxy targets or disentanglement claim.

objective: Bind every revised conclusion to a named control and evidence boundary
required_output: Seven-row CSV JSON TeX ledger for morphology rhythm context/fusion calibration robustness external and adaptation
notes: Strict mode fails until all required P0/P1 artifacts are authenticated; optional physiological probes remain a separately reported blocker when measured targets are unavailable.
